commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds QA Lab script-producer helpers and tests, expands the Docker E2E lane wrapper/list/help surface, and removes QA transport helper re-exports from the live transport scenario module.

PR surface: Source +387, Tests +194, Other +38. Total +619 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding. Source inspection of the latest PR head shows the timeout close path calling `finish(result)`, while the current-main sibling runner has a guard that preserves pending forced cleanup timers.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can mirror the sibling Windows timeout cleanup guard and add coverage without a product decision.

target.title: test(qa): add script producer e2e fixtures
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Finishes the reusable script-producer part of step 1 of the real-E2E QA cleanup plan after #97915, and cleans up the broad transport-scenario re-export.

The goal is to make future script-to-QA migrations produce honest QA evidence without each scenario reimplementing artifact paths, evidence summaries, command logs, or child process timeout cleanup.

## Why This Change Was Made

- Adds `extensions/qa-lab/src/script-producer.ts` for shared QA script producer option parsing, artifact writes, evidence bundle generation, and bounded child-command execution inside the QA Lab-owned boundary.
- Adds regression coverage for producer evidence output, command logging, timeout force-settlement, detached process-group cleanup, Windows `taskkill /T` command construction, and shared temp-dir cleanup.
- Expands `scripts/qa/docker-e2e-lane.ts` with remaining existing Docker lane names and a `--list`/`--help` surface for QA scenario adapters.
- Removes the broad re-export of `qa-transport-scenarios` from `live-transport-scenarios.ts`; callers should import the QA transport helpers directly from their canonical module.

## User Impact

No taxonomy IDs or product runtime behavior change. This is QA infrastructure for making future QA Lab script producers more meaningful and less duplicated while preserving child-process cleanup for E2E/script producers.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/script-producer.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/extension-test-boundary.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-qa.config.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/qa-transport-scenarios.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-runtime-api.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/qa-channel-transport.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/crabline-transport.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-runtime-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qa-lab/src/script-producer.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/script-producer.test.ts scripts/qa/docker-e2e-lane.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/shared/live-transport-scenarios.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode commit --commit HEAD` clean after accepted fixes
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
